name: Apaleo Open Hotel Platform API
what_it_does: Apaleo open cloud hotel platform REST API for innovative hotel operators, tech-forward hotel groups, and hospitality technology developers to build custom hotel management experiences on a headless, API-first property management system. Enables AI agents to manage property and unit type configuration for hotel product catalog automation, handle reservation lifecycle management for hotel booking automation, access rate and availability management for hotel revenue optimization automation, retrieve financial account and folio management for hotel billing automation, manage housekeeping assignment and room status for hotel operations automation, handle payment processing and tokenization for hotel transaction automation, access guest communication integration via Apaleo App Suite for hotel guest engagement automation, retrieve reporting and analytics data for hotel business intelligence automation, manage multi-property configuration for hotel group management, and integrate Apaleo with the Apaleo App Store ecosystem (200+ apps) for end-to-end custom hotel technology stack building.
use_cases: Building custom hotel PMS from headless property management agents
Integrating revenue management from hotel rate optimization agents
Automating reservations from booking platform integration agents
Orchestrating hotel tech stack from property operations agents
not_for: Traditional hotels needing full-featured PMS out of the box without API integration (use Oracle OPERA or Mews)
Vacation rental management (use Guesty or Lodgify)
Casino hotel management requiring gaming integration
best_when: A tech-forward hotel operator, hotel tech startup, or innovative hotel group wanting AI agents to build custom hotel management experiences on Apaleo's API-first, headless PMS platform with unrestricted API access and Apaleo App Store ecosystem integration.
avoid_when: APALEO API-FIRST REQUIRES FRONTEND BUILD OR APP STORE SELECTION: Apaleo is a headless PMS — it provides no native front-end UI; automated workflows via Apaleo require either building custom UI for hotel staff or selecting apps from Apaleo App Store for each PMS function; automated deployment without UI plan creates a property with backend data but no operational interface for hotel staff. APALEO EUROPE-ORIGIN GDPR DATA RESIDENCY: Apaleo is a German company with European data residency by default; automated integration for US hotel properties must verify data residency configuration; European data processing for US guest PII creates GDPR/US hotel data sovereignty consideration. FINANCIAL ACCOUNT FOLIO IDEMPOTENCY FOR PAYMENT POSTING: Apaleo financial posting supports idempotency keys; automated payment posting without idempotency key implementation risks duplicate payment charges on network retry; always implement idempotency keys for automated payment and charge posting operations.

auth.notes: Apaleo uses OAuth 2.0 (client credentials and authorization code) with fine-grained scopes. REST API with JSON. OpenAPI spec publicly available. Munich, Germany HQ. Founded 2016 by Christoph Herschel and Georg Eder. Private (Creandum, Holtzbrinck Ventures). API-first headless hotel PMS. 200+ apps in Apaleo App Store. GDPR. PCI-DSS compliant payments. Free sandbox available. Developer-first documentation. Competes with Mews (also developer-friendly) and Oracle OPERA Cloud for tech-forward hotel PMS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free sandbox environment for development and testing; production requires subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-unit (room) monthly subscription; multi-property pricing; Apaleo App Store apps priced separately by app vendor
pricing.notes: Munich Germany. Private (Creandum). Per-unit monthly subscription. Free sandbox. App Store apps additional. GDPR.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in API spec; webhooks for reservation, folio, and room status events

known_agent_gotchas: HEADLESS PMS REQUIRES COMPLETE UI STRATEGY: Apaleo provides no native staff-facing UI; automated hotel management workflows built on Apaleo require selecting or building front-end apps for every staff interaction (front desk, housekeeping, reservations); omitting UI strategy for any operational function creates operational gap where automated backend has no human touchpoint interface

APP STORE DEPENDENCY FOR FUNCTIONAL COVERAGE: Apaleo core PMS covers reservations, rooms, rates, and financials; additional functionality (channel manager, revenue management, guest messaging, POS) requires Apaleo App Store app integration; automated hotel tech stack built on Apaleo requires app vendor evaluation for each functional layer; app-level API changes by third-party App Store vendors are outside Apaleo's control

OAUTH SCOPE SELECTION FOR MINIMAL PRIVILEGE: Apaleo offers granular OAuth scopes per domain (reservations.read, rates.manage, financials.manage, etc.); automated agents should request minimum necessary scopes; over-scoped credentials accessing financial and rate data beyond operational need creates unnecessary access to sensitive hotel revenue data

RESERVATION IDEMPOTENCY KEY FOR BOOKING AGENTS: Apaleo reservation creation supports idempotency keys; automated booking agents that retry reservation creation on network failure must implement idempotency keys; duplicate reservation creation without idempotency creates overbooking for date ranges with single available unit

APALEO PAYMENTS vs EXTERNAL PAYMENT PROVIDER ROUTING: Apaleo has native payment processing and supports external payment gateway integration; automated payment workflows must consistently use one payment path per property; mixing Apaleo native payments and external gateway for same property creates reconciliation and folio posting complexity in automated financial workflows
agent_readiness.security_notes: Hotel open platform. PCI-DSS, GDPR. OAuth2 with granular scopes. EU/US. Guest reservation, payment token, and hotel financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Hotel platform. PCI-DSS, GDPR. OAuth2 granular scopes. EU/US. Reservation, payment, and financial data.
